Text:
Free entry from 6pm tonight. The final evening of the Hitchin Beer & Cider Festival 2026 is on us.

Come and join us for the last few hours. There is no charge to get in from 6pm; you simply leave a small deposit for your festival glass, refunded in full when you hand it back at the end of the night. Around 200 real ales, ciders, perries and meads are waiting at the bar, and the marquee is warm, dry and ready for one last good evening.

We close at 10pm. Whether you are rounding off the weekend or fancy a swift one on the way home, you are very welcome. See you in there.

6th June 2026
King George V Playing Fields, Old Hale Way, Hitchin, SG5 1XL

#HitchinBeerFestival #HBCF2026 #RealAle #RealCider #CAMRA #Hitchin #NorthHerts #Hertfordshire #SupportLocal #CommunityEvent

In partnership with CAMRA North Hertfordshire and Hitchin Rugby Club.
